listings.description: Welcome to this beautifully maintained 4-bedroom single-family home in the highly sought-after Ashton Downs community, just minutes from historic Downtown Leesburg and the W&OD Trail. This is true gem and a rare opportunity not to be missed. Upon entering, you will be greeted by hardwood flooring throughout the main level and a spacious, functional floor plan designed for both everyday living and entertaining. The updated kitchen features recessed lighting, stainless steel appliances, a center island, and pantry. Adjacent to the kitchen, the family room has a gas fireplace with direct access to the rear deck and fully fenced yard. The main level also includes a private home office, formal living room, dining room, and an updated powder room. Upstairs, you will find four generously sized bedrooms and two fully renovated bathrooms. The spacious primary suite features a large walk-in closet and a beautifully updated en-suite bath with tile flooring, a double vanity with granite countertops, a soaking tub, and a separate shower. The basement provides abundant storage space and convenient access to the backyard. This home is turn key! Major system updates include a new water heater (2021), HVAC system (2018), and roof (2017), providing peace of mind for years to come. This one will not last long!

listings.address: 241 Edwards Ferry Rd NE, Leesburg, VA, 20176
listings.description: Welcome to 241 Edwards Ferry Road, a rarely available opportunity in one of Leesburg's most desirable and walkable locations. Just a short 10-minute walk from historic downtown Leesburg, this home offers the perfect blend of location, potential, and value. The centerpiece of the home is the beautifully renovated kitchen, completely updated just two years ago with modern cabinetry, updated countertops, stylish finishes, and quality appliances. Whether you're preparing a weeknight meal or entertaining guests, this inviting space is ready to enjoy from day one. While the kitchen has already been transformed, the rest of the home presents an exciting opportunity for buyers looking to build equity and make a home their own. This is not a fully renovated property-instead, it's a true value-add opportunity with great bones, plenty of character, and loads of upside for those with vision. Whether you're looking to update over time or undertake a more comprehensive renovation, the potential here is undeniable. Adding to the appeal, many of the major systems have already been addressed, including the roof, HVAC system, and water heater, all replaced within the last five years. With these big-ticket items already taken care of, you can focus your efforts on personalizing the home to match your style and needs. Natural light fills the living spaces, creating a warm and welcoming atmosphere throughout. Outside, enjoy one of Leesburg's most sought-after locations, with award-winning restaurants, local boutiques, breweries, coffee shops, parks, and year-round community events all within walking distance. Homes in this location rarely come to market, especially those offering this combination of walkability, major system updates, and the chance to create something truly special. If you've been searching for a property with strong potential and room to add value, 241 Edwards Ferry Road is an opportunity you won't want to miss.

Beautifully appointed and rich in character, this four-bedroom, two-and-a-half-bath residence by renowned local builder Paul Reimers is ideally situated in the heart of historic downtown Leesburg. Thoughtfully designed and meticulously maintained, the home offers an exceptional blend of timeless craftsmanship and modern convenience. The interior showcases gleaming wood floors that flow seamlessly throughout the main living spaces, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere. At the heart of the home, a well-equipped kitchen features stainless steel appliances, granite countertops, and ample cabinetry-perfectly suited for both everyday living and effortless entertaining. A highly desirable main-level primary bedroom offers both comfort and convenience, providing a private retreat with easy accessibility. This thoughtfully positioned space enhances the home's livability, ideal for a variety of lifestyle needs. Upstairs, additional generously sized bedrooms provide flexibility for guests, home office space, or personal retreats, complemented by a well-appointed bath that reflect the home's classic aesthetic. Outdoors, a fully fenced yard creates a private oasis, ideal for relaxation, play, or al fresco gatherings. A large shed adds both functionality and storage, enhancing the property's practical appeal. Set just moments from Leesburg's charming shops, dining, and historic landmarks, this exceptional home presents a rare opportunity to enjoy refined living in one of Northern Virginia's most desirable settings. Photos to be uploaded 4/25

***Offer Deadline 06/22 6 PM ***** Welcome to this beautifully updated, move-in-ready 3-level home located at 105 Appletree Drive NE in the peaceful, No HOA community of Carrvale. Featuring 4 bedrooms and 2.5 baths, 2 Car garage, this residence has been meticulously modernized with designer LVT flooring on all levels, fresh neutral gray paint, and upgraded recessed lighting, newer appliances in kitchen -microwave, dishwasher, Newer water Heater, Basement finished with County approval, New Electric Panel, Sb Panel. The heart of the home is a Spacious Family Room with a Freshly painted Brick Wall fireplace with access to Deck, the Family Room across the stunning kitchen complete with granite countertops, crisp white cabinets, island, stainless steel appliances. Spacious Living, plus a Dining Area, plus a Half bath complete this floor. All bathrooms have been updated with newer vanities, updated plumbing fixtures. Enjoy the expansive primary bedroom suite on upper level , with its own walk-in closet and dressing area, and primary Bath, plus 3 Other spacious Bedrooms with a Shared Updated Bathroom. Enjoy the Deck and its panoramic view of outside to the spacious fenced Backyard with a storage shed plus a Vegetable garden patch setup for new homers to pursue their own gardening interests. Best of all, you are just minutes away from the vibrant boutiques, award-winning dining, local boutiques, cozy coffee shops, and popular breweries and rich culture of historic downtown Leesburg, offering the perfect blend of modern comfort and small-town charm. Also minutes from Route 7/Leesburg Pike, the Historic & scenic W & OD trail, Leesburg Outlet Mall, the scenic Route 15 which connects to Frederick MD, History buffs and nature lovers alike will thrive here; the home is minutes from iconic landmarks like George C. Marshall's Dodona Manor the sprawling, 1,000-acre Morven Park estate. the premier Ida Lee Park and Recreation Center. Don't miss your chance to own a piece of Leesburg living! Open House this saturday 6/20, from 1:00PM - 3:00PM

Come home to a place that instantly calms your mind with its expansive serene backyard views. This one of a kind lot will not disappoint with open views and perfect walking distance to downtown Leesburg and Ida Lee Rec Center. This stunning renovated Colonial home in the desirable Exeter community boasts three levels of excellent living space, featuring 3 spacious bedrooms and 3.5 bathrooms. All major updates include windows(2021), roof(2013), HVAC(2020) and siding(2021). The gourmet kitchen, complete with a pantry, new quartz countertops and updated appliances, flows seamlessly into the family room, perfect for entertaining. Enjoy brand new luxury laminate plank and ceramic tile flooring throughout, along with energy-efficient windows and a cozy wood fireplace. Recent renovations in 2024-2025 enhance the property's appeal, while the fully finished daylight basement offers additional living space with custom wood bar, kitchenette, and bedroom/office design. The exterior features include a deck, hot tub, and enclosed storage all set against a backdrop of endless open space views. Community amenities include a pool, basketball courts, and playgrounds, fostering a vibrant neighborhood atmosphere. Conveniently located within walking distance to schools, parks, and beautiful downtown Leesburg , this home offers both comfort and community engagement. With ample parking and a well-maintained yard, this property is a perfect blend of style and functionality.

Experience elevated living in this extraordinary Leesburg residence, where timeless design meets modern life on a beautifully landscaped 0.38-acre homesite. Extensively renovated with uncompromising attention to detail, this exceptional property offers a rare turnkey opportunity with high-end finishes and sophisticated upgrades throughout. The thoughtfully designed floor plan features 4 generously sized bedrooms and 5 beautifully appointed full bathrooms, creating an ideal balance of comfort and elegance. The heart of the home is a stunning gourmet kitchen outfitted with custom cabinetry, quartz surfaces, a dramatic waterfall island, designer backsplash, and premium Samsung stainless steel appliances-perfectly suited for both everyday living and entertaining. Natural light pours through all-new energy-efficient windows, illuminating the refined interiors accented by luxury flooring, custom millwork, modern lighting, and impeccable craftsmanship at every turn. Spa-inspired bathrooms showcase designer tile selections and upscale finishes, while major system upgrades-including a new HVAC system, electrical panel, water heater, and more-provide peace of mind for years to come. Outdoor spaces are equally impressive, featuring an expansive Trex deck overlooking a private, fully fenced backyard with fresh landscaping and lush new sod. A newly paved driveway and oversized garage with upgraded features complete the home's impressive list of enhancements. Situated in an established neighborhood with no HOA, residents enjoy convenient access to walking trails, top-rated schools, premier shopping, dining, and commuter routes. Just minutes from Leesburg Premium Outlets, Costco, Route 7, and Route 15, this exceptional property delivers the perfect blend of luxury, convenience, and modern living.

Tucked along the most coveted street in Historic Downtown Leesburg, this is a rare and remarkable opportunity to restore and reimagine a piece of local history. Set on prestigious Cornwall Street in NW Leesburg - just moments from the boutiques, restaurants, coffee shops, and community life of downtown - this historic residence is waiting for its next passionate steward. For the buyer who reveres historic architecture and understands the irreplaceable value of location, character, and craftsmanship, this property offers extraordinary potential. The home is being sold AS-IS with thoughtfully designed architectural plans already approved by the Town of Leesburg's Board of Architectural Review (BAR), saving the next owner significant time, expense, and uncertainty. The approved plans expand the residence from approximately 1,840 to over 3,000 finished square feet and envision a beautifully livable historic home with four bedrooms, 3.5 baths, a gracious primary suite, and a modern kitchen flowing seamlessly into open family and dining spaces. Additional features include a screened porch, mudroom, laundry room, and detached two-car garage with driveway parking - all carefully designed to honor the home's historic integrity while elevating everyday living. Extensive groundwork has already been completed by the current owner, including over $100,000 invested in architectural planning, BAR approval, site clearing, tree removal, exterior restoration, lead-safe paint remediation, debris removal, and preparation for renovation. The non-historic addition to the guest house has also been removed to better preserve the property's architectural authenticity. This is not a project for the faint of heart - but for the visionary buyer, the reward is the opportunity to create something truly exceptional on one of Leesburg's most treasured streets. Please note: Located within Leesburg's Historic District, exterior modifications to the home remain subject to BAR approval. Interior renovations are at the discretion of the homeowner. The home may not be demolished. Listing price is below tax-assessed value. Cash buyers preferred. Showings by appointment only with proof of funds. Serious inquiries only. *All information deemed reliable but not guaranteed. All measurements and data should be independently verified by the buyer* Owner is agent.

listings.address: 103 Country Club Dr SW, Leesburg, VA, 20175
listings.description: Don't miss 103 Country Club Drive SW, located in the sought-after Leesburg Country Club community. This home offers 3,566 total square feet on a large level lot, four bedrooms, and three full bathrooms. Updates include, original windows replaced, roof replacement (10 years or less), HVAC (6 years or less), Hot water heater (10 years or less), new carpet in the family room. A welcoming front porch and garden beds create an inviting first impression. The main level features a traditional layout with easy flow between the primary gathering spaces, including the living room, dining room, kitchen, family room, and office. The sizable kitchen sits at the heart of the home and offers a large breakfast area with table space framed by a bay window, stainless steel appliances, and a peninsula island. The kitchen opens to the family room, offering new carpet, a cozy wood-burning fireplace, and sliding glass doors that exit to the patio and backyard. A full bathroom and access to the attached two-car garage complete this level. One of the highlights of the home is the fully fenced backyard retreat, featuring abundant green space and a large patio with plenty of room for outdoor dining and grilling-perfect for relaxing or entertaining. Upstairs, you'll find four bedrooms and two full bathrooms. The primary suite features a large walk-in closet and an ensuite bathroom with a soaking tub and stand-alone shower. The finished lower level provides abundant flex space, ideal for a home gym, game room, media room, or a combination of all three. A wood-burning stove adds warmth and character. In addition, the lower level includes a laundry room, large storage room, and utility room. Conveniently located near historic downtown Leesburg, the home is close to a variety of dining, shopping, and entertainment options, including the Leesburg Premium Outlets and Costco. It also offers easy access to major commuter routes, Dulles International Airport, and destinations throughout the DMV region. PIANO CONVEYS.

OPEN HOUSE JUNE 20th, 11am-1pm. See the rest, then come see the best! You will immediately know you are home upon entering. Enjoy beautiful scraped hardwood flooring throughout the main level, with refinished kitchen cabinets, a new island and granite counters. Newly refinished white cabinets and "agreeable" grey walls perfectly complement each other, and you will thoroughly enjoy the spotless appliances and beautiful view of your fenced yard from the kitchen windows. Enjoy time together with family and friends in the family room off the kitchen, and impress your guests with the freshly painted deck with a newly installed canopy for shade on hot days. The upstairs boasts 4bd/2ba, with the comfort and warmth of newer carpeting. The newly finished downstairs features a nice family room, a partial kitchen, reading/study area, a full bath and a non-conforming 5th bedroom (or den, office, etc). Walkout to the lush and fully fenced backyard, and store your seasonal items in the built-in shed. You will also love the fresh clean look of freshly painted doors and trim, with new stainless hardware on all doors. With a new roof (2019), Trane HVAC, and over-sized gas hot water heater, you're assured many years of carefree living.

WELCOME TO 314 BELMONT PLACE- Leesburg just voted #2 best place to live in VA! **WALKING DISTANCE TO DOWNTOWN LEESBURG & NEW CATOCTIN WALK / HARRISON POST Development with NEW retail and restaurants*** NO HOA, NO HISTORIC REGULATIONS. SO MUCH POTENTIAL. RARE combination of LOCATION AND MOVE IN READY CONDITION UNDER 800k! Beautifully maintained brick rambler nestled on a private 12-home cul-de-sac, just steps from the W&OD Trail and within walking distance to everything downtown Leesburg has to offer! Walkable to Catoctin Elementary and LCHS. The main level features 3 spacious bedrooms and 2 full baths. An updated kitchen seamlessly connects the dining room, flexible informal living space, and a large, light-filled family room. Two sliding glass doors open to the patio and backyard-perfect for effortless indoor-outdoor entertaining. The lower level offers a cozy family room ideal for a home office, playroom, or media space, complete with built-in bookshelves. You'll also find two bonus rooms, a full bath, and abundant storage in the unfinished area. A 2-car garage plus a 10x14 shed provide excellent storage options. The fully fenced, flat backyard completes this exceptional property-offering privacy, space, and versatility.

Beautifully renovated and thoughtfully designed for comfort and convenience, this spacious 3-bedroom, 3 full bath home offers true one-level living in a quiet, established neighborhood with no HOA. Situated on a large corner lot, the home features hardwood floors throughout the main level, fresh paint, and new carpet in all bedrooms. Each bedroom includes custom closet built-ins for added organization and functionality. The layout is ideal for a variety of needs, including potential handicap accessibility with a roll-in shower. The updated kitchen is equipped with stove, a new microwave, and plenty of space for cooking and gathering. Step outside to enjoy the brand new Trex deck and freshly landscaped yard-perfect for relaxing or entertaining. Additional upgrades include a new HVAC system (August 2025), gutter guards, and an extra-deep two-car garage offering ample storage. The fully finished basement expands your living space with a potential additional bedroom and a separate outside entrance-ideal for a future in-law suite, studio, home office, or rental opportunity. Conveniently located near shopping, commuter routes, schools, parks, and scenic trails, this move-in ready home offers flexibility, modern updates, and a prime location all in one.

Private cul-de-sac setting, an expansive fenced backyard, and major system updates already completed make this home stand out from the start. This 4-bedroom, 3.5-bath home offers bright, oversized living spaces throughout. The main level features a welcoming living room centered around a double-sided fireplace shared with the family room and sunroom, along with spacious dining and gathering areas designed for everyday living and entertaining. The kitchen has been refreshed with painted cabinetry, updated hardware, and a newer refrigerator (2021). Outside, the custom hardscape brick patio completed in 2019 creates an ideal setup for cookouts, outdoor dining, morning coffee, or entertaining guests. The beautifully landscaped front and backyard include a sprinkler system, French drain, and an Amish-built shed (2023) for additional storage and functionality. The home also features a 418 sq ft 2-car garage. Upstairs, the spacious primary suite includes a renovated spa-inspired bath completed in 2025 featuring a jetted tub. Additional bathrooms have also been refreshed with updated finishes, and toilets were replaced throughout the home in 2025 and 2026. The finished walkout basement provides even more flexible living space with a full bath, direct backyard access, and surround sound speakers that convey with the home, making it perfect for movie nights, game days, or a secondary recreation area. You'll appreciate the extensive list of major improvements already completed, including windows and siding replaced (2021), updated gutters with LeafGuard protection (2021), HVAC (2020), roof (2013), sliding glass basement door (2021), sprinkler system updates (2023), front door (2024), and freshly re-sanded patio surfaces (2026). Located in the Greenway Farm community, this home offers convenient access to Greenway Park, Greenway Farms Pool, Evergreen Mill amenities, shopping, dining, commuter routes, and Route 15 for easy travel throughout Loudoun County. Community amenities include outdoor pools, tennis courts, volleyball courts, and common grounds for even more outdoor enjoyment. Homes with this combination of cul-de-sac placement, lot size, privacy, and extensive updates rarely become available. Schedule your tour and experience the space, functionality, and value this Leesburg home has to offer.

Welcome to 306 Lounsbury Ct NE - a beautifully updated split-level home in the heart of historic Leesburg offering NO HOA and fully paid-off solar panels for exceptional long-term value. More than just move-in ready, this home offers a rare combination of comfort, efficiency, and smart homeownership. While many homeowners experienced rising utility costs this winter, the current owners enjoyed electric bills averaging approximately just $10/month thanks to the owned solar panel system. It's a valuable advantage in today's market, providing meaningful monthly savings and protection against increasing energy costs - without the added expense of a solar loan or lease. Inside, the home features a comfortable and functional layout with four bedrooms and two full bathrooms upstairs, including a spacious primary suite with dual closets for practical storage. Natural light fills the home throughout the day, while the skylight creates a warm and inviting ambiance in the evening. The main level is designed for both everyday living and entertaining. The spacious kitchen opens to the family room, where a cozy fireplace and built-in entertainment center create a welcoming gathering space. French glass doors offer flexibility and privacy when desired, while sliding doors lead directly to the backyard for easy indoor-outdoor living. A formal dining room and an additional living area provide plenty of space to host guests, relax, or work comfortably from home. Recent updates include fresh paint throughout, brand-new carpet, updated lighting, refreshed bathrooms, and a clean, modern feel from top to bottom. Additional highlights include a two-car garage, spacious backyard, and an unbeatable location just a few blocks away from Downtown Leesburg, where you can enjoy local shops, restaurants, community events, and historic attractions while still benefiting from a quiet residential setting. The home is also located just one mile from Ida Lee Park, Leesburg's renowned 138-acre recreation destination featuring indoor and outdoor pools, sports fields, walking trails, playgrounds, and a full recreation center. With an improved price, energy-saving features, and a highly desirable location, this is an opportunity you do not want to miss. (Virtually Staged)

A Century of Character in Downtown Leesburg Leesburg Historic District, Leesburg, VA 3 BD | 1 BA | 1/3 Acre Lot | Built 1910 | Detached 2-Car Garage | Sold As-Is Steeped in history and full of original charm, this 1910 craftsman-era home sits proudly in the heart of Leesburg's beloved Historic District - lovingly cared for by the same family for over 50 years. Offered for sale as-is, this is a rare chance to own a piece of Leesburg history and make it your own. Step up onto the welcoming covered front porch - the perfect spot for a morning coffee - and into a home that has been cherished across generations. Inside, warm and cozy bedrooms invite rest, while the bathroom retains its original claw-foot tub, a true hallmark of the era. Original hardwood floors are believed to lie beneath the current flooring, waiting to be uncovered and restored to their former glory. The property sits on an exceptional 1/3-acre lot - a genuinely rare find in downtown Leesburg - offering space, privacy, and possibilities that simply don't come along often in this location. A detached two-car garage adds even more practical value. Whether you're a preservation enthusiast, an investor, or a buyer dreaming of restoring a classic home to its original splendor, this property delivers unmatched potential in one of Northern Virginia's most sought-after historic neighborhoods. Properties like this - with this much soul - rarely come to market. HISTORIC DISTRICT NOTICE: This property lies within the Town of Leesburg Historic District. Future exterior renovations and alterations are subject to review and approval by the Leesburg Board of Architectural Review (BAR). Prospective buyers are encouraged to familiarize themselves with applicable guidelines prior to making an offer. ADDITIONAL NOTICE: The home is currently occupied and furnished. AI-assisted editing was used to remove furnishings from interior listing photos. Property is being sold strictly as-is.

listings.address: 715 Valley View Ave SW, Leesburg, VA, 20175
listings.description: <NA>

Charming 2-bedroom, 2 full bath bungalow in the heart of Downtown Leesburg's Old & Historic District offering the perfect blend of historic character and modern luxury. Nestled on picturesque Ayr Street, this thoughtfully designed home features a secluded retreat-like backyard with a beautiful flagstone patio and detached 1-car garage, along with a long driveway providing additional off-street parking. Inside, enjoy hardwood floors throughout, a gourmet kitchen, custom recessed lighting, custom built-in shelving, custom window seats, two fireplaces, and a fully finished basement that could serve as a third bedroom and includes rough-in plumbing for a 1/2 bath. The upper level offers a spacious primary suite with a private full bath, while the second upstairs full bath features a frameless glass shower enclosure. HVAC and hot water heater were replaced in 2020. Originally built in 1920, 4 Ayr Street is an historic property that was thoughtfully reimagined through a major renovation completed in 2007 by renowned local builder Paul Reimers as part of an award-winning infill development in Downtown Leesburg's Historic District. The home was designed to honor the architectural character and charm of the early 20th-century residences once found along Ayr Street, while seamlessly incorporating modern conveniences and updated living spaces for today's lifestyle. All just moments from shops, restaurants, parks, and everything Downtown Leesburg has to offer.

Opportunity is knocking *****LOOKING FOR A Place to build your own SWEAT Equity???Are you a DIY Person???? DO you LOVE to renovate and live in your own Reno??????This is The perfect Opportunity- ESPECIALLY if you want to leave a little bit of history / Vintage - LOOK No Further !!!!!**** This charming place has a throwback in time feel with original kitchen, baths and floors*****All Brick Rambler with a finished Lower Level ****Offers flexibility in the floor plan*****Two Wood Burning Fireplaces**** Hardwood Floors *****Covered Back Patio ******Includes an attached garagePLUS a detached garage with WORKSHOP and two sheds *- this could work well with all of your DIY projects***The Detached Garage could be for that Car Lover & or Hobbyist!!!! A Niche Property & a Great Opportunity - SOOOOOOOOOOO Close to Downtown Leesburg - minutes from all the shopping, restaurants, parks, trails, wine & beer venues, recreation and so much more !!!! Home can be sold by itself although another Rambler next door could make this an interesting Multi Generational Living Lifestyle - just in separate houses- contact agent for information for potential purchase ****Vacant lot for sale too****** Oh the Possibilities !!! Renovation Potential/Work Shop Potential / Hobbyist / Car Lover ******NO HOA******Rare Find on almost an acre!!!!!!

Welcome to 125 Claude Court! This charming 5-bedroom home is located on a quiet cul de sac in the highly desirable Evergreen Meadows neighborhood. It's classic stone front, fresh landscaping and welcoming front porch creates instant curb appeal for this spacious home. There's a comfy swing on the porch-the perfect spot for morning coffee or unwinding after busy days. The main level features hardwoods in the foyer and hallway, an updated eat-in kitchen with plenty of prep and pantry space. Updated Corian countertops, LVP flooring (2026), and newer appliances (2021) make this kitchen perfect for cooking and entertaining. The kitchen opens to a bright family room with a stone gas fireplace, new carpet, and large windows. A separate study, living room, dining room and half bath add so much gathering space for friends and family on the main level of this house. Upstairs you will find 5 bedrooms including a freshly painted primary bedroom with a walk-in closet and full bathroom with soaking tub, double sinks and a separate shower. The other 4 bedrooms and full bath offer generous space for guests and family or potential rooms for whatever a buyer needs. Enjoy beautiful sunsets from the deck off the kitchen leading to a private fenced backyard oasis with mature trees. The new owners will have plenty of room for grilling, pets, and play. The finished basement has a full bath and finished laundry room along with a great room and kitchenette (sink/fridge). The basement has so much potential - room for a gym, second office, theater room, playroom or home school classroom. There are also plenty of unfinished storage areas too. The basement has its own separate walkout entrance leading to a stone patio. The shed, stone patio and path were added in 2025. The roof was replaced in 2018; New Water Heater 2018; New HVAC 2017. This is a loved and well maintained home! You will get the small-town feel, but with everything you need close by. There is a community pool and tennis/pickle ball courts while being just minutes from downtown Leesburg shopping and dining; Ida Lee Recreation Center; the ION Rinks at Compass Creek; and the W&OD Trail! Not to mention easy commute access to the Dulles Greenway leading to Dulles Airport, Reston, Tysons Corner and Washington, DC. Look no further, you are home!

Escape to your own private sanctuary in the heart of Tavistock Farms with this stunningly updated five-bedroom home on a premium lot that backs directly to a lush, wooded common area. The main level offers a perfect balance of work and play, featuring a secluded home office with navy accent walls for those who work from home. The back of the house opens up into a massively open kitchen and family room combo that serves as the true heart of the home. This 2022 kitchen renovation is a knockout, featuring a massive white-veined stone island, high-end stainless steel appliances, and custom two-tone cabinetry. It flows directly into the family room, which is anchored by a stone fireplace and a custom live-edge mantle, with a wall of windows that brings the forest views inside. The thoughtful floor plan provides four generous bedrooms on the upper level, including a primary retreat with a dedicated sitting room and spa-like bath. A true standout feature is the fully finished, walk-out lower level, which is expertly designed for multi-generational living or a high-end guest suite. This self-contained space includes a private fifth bedroom with a full-sized window, a full bath, and its own complete second kitchen and breakfast bar-allowing for total independence and comfort. Your outdoor space is built for total privacy, featuring a sprawling rear deck with a gazebo and tea lights, all enclosed in a fully fenced yard where the only neighbors behind you are the trees. This home is completely move-in ready with every major system recently replaced, including a new roof and gutters (2022), high-efficiency HVAC with a UV air filter (2020), and a new water heater (2020). Beyond the property line, the highly sought-after Tavistock Farms community offers a premier lifestyle with an active clubhouse, a swimming pool, and miles of scenic walking trails. You are perfectly positioned just minutes from the charm of historic downtown Leesburg's dining and boutique shopping, while enjoying immediate access to the Dulles Greenway and Route 7 for an easy commute.

Stunning Colonial with thoroughly updated flair, sited on a peaceful cul-de-sac in sought after Potomac Station! The home is set in the quiet of suburbia with easy access to paths and trail while recreation centers, fine dining, cultural events, sports venues and shopping are an easy drive away. Thoughtfully designed and recently renovated, the home features 4 spacious bedrooms and 3.5 bathrooms. Owners can retire in their private suite with a sizable sitting area and an en-suite bath featuring a 5-foot Jacuzzi soaking tub. Additional upstairs bedrooms are generously sized. On the main level, step into the two-story foyer and the floor plan features an expansive family room with fireplace, living room, formal dining room and an open concept updated kitchen boasting 2026 stainless steel appliances. The kitchen leads to a brand new 2026 gorgeous custom Trex deck with space enough for grills and smokers, making entertaining fun for family, friends or business as easy parking provides 2 spaces on the driveway in addition to the 2-car garage and further parking on the cul de sac. The laundry room features 2024 Speed Queen Washer and Dryer. A Kinetico water treatment and softener system added in 2024 and a whole house Honeywell Electronic Air Cleaner system provide optimal living conditions. A gas fired, hot water heater unit has been upgraded to 120 gallons to serve the sizable Jacuzzi soaking tub of the primary bathroom. The 2023 GAF Timberline roof is covered by a 35 year transferable warranty An expansive room with walkout to the lush backyard as well as a full bathroom make the finished part of the basement fit for any use your lifestyle may require. The 2-car garage features upgraded workshop electric with multiple 15 amp and 20 amp outlets as well as a 240 volt single phase service allowing faster EV charging or powerful DIY applications. Upgraded workshop wiring is also available in the 400 sq.ft. unfinished part of the basement which provides huge storage space. Access to Verizon 1.0 GB high speed service, Ethernet Category 5 hard wired throughout the house and proximity to the commuter bus lot, the Silver Line, and Government and Contractor and IT company offices in Chantilly, Dulles, Reston, Tyson's Corner, and Washington DC make this home perfect for work from home or occasional or regular commuting.

Prepare to be impressed by this stunning, fully renovated home where no detail has been overlooked. From the moment you arrive, you'll notice the exceptional curb appeal featuring brand-new siding, roof, windows, gutters, an insulated garage door, exterior door, and a welcoming Trex front porch designed for low-maintenance enjoyment. Step inside to discover a bright, modern interior enhanced by fresh paint, recessed lighting, stylish new fixtures, waterproof flooring, new interior doors, and plush new carpet in bedrooms. The heart of the home is the beautifully designed kitchen, showcasing elegant quartz countertops, 42-inch soft-close cabinetry, and high-end finishes that blend style and functionality. The luxurious bathrooms have been completely remodeled with contemporary finishes, creating spa-inspired spaces you'll love. Major updates including a brand-new HVAC system and water heater provide comfort, efficiency, and peace of mind for years to come. Outdoor living is just as impressive with a spacious deck that's perfect for entertaining, grilling, or simply relaxing with family and friends. Nestled in the sought-after Country Club community with no HOA restrictions, this home offers the rare combination of modern upgrades, timeless design, and true move-in-ready convenience. Opportunities like this are few and far between-- Don't miss your chance to own this exceptional home!

Seller Offering $5,000 Toward Buyer's Closing Costs or Interest Rate Buydown! Take advantage of this opportunity to reduce upfront expenses or lower your monthly mortgage payment while enjoying all that this beautiful Elysian Heights home has to offer. Nestled in the highly sought-after Elysian Heights community of Leesburg, this beautifully maintained 5-bedroom, 3.5-bath home offers the perfect blend of comfort, functionality, and everyday elegance. Built in 2007 and offering over 3,500 finished square feet, this home welcomes you with its timeless brick-and-Hardie plank exterior, manicured lawn, and inviting curb appeal that immediately feels like home. Inside, the main level is designed for both living and entertaining, featuring a bright formal living and dining room and a dedicated home office, ideal for today's flexible lifestyle. The heart of the home is the spacious family room with a cozy gas fireplace, seamlessly flowing into a well-appointed kitchen complete with a large center island with seating, stainless steel appliances, generous cabinetry, and an expansive pantry. Upstairs, the primary suite serves as a true retreat, featuring a large walk-in closet and a spa-like bath featuring dual vanities, a soaking tub offering mountain views, and an oversized shower. Three additional bedrooms, a full bath, and a conveniently located laundry room with a utility sink and ample storage complete the upper level. The fully finished walk-out lower level expands your living space, offering endless possibilities for entertaining, recreation, or relaxation. Wired for a home entertainment system, this level also includes a fifth bedroom and a full bath, perfect for guests, extended family, or a private suite. Step outside to an inviting deck just off the kitchen, where you'll enjoy peaceful views of Sugarloaf Mountain, perfect for morning coffee or evening gatherings under the stars. Recent updates provide peace of mind and modern comfort, including a new roof (2025), upper-level HVAC system (2024), brand-new carpeting, and fresh neutral paint throughout (2026). Beyond the home itself, the lifestyle in Elysian Heights truly sets this property apart. Ideally positioned next to two expansive common areas, this home is just a short walk to the community pool, clubhouse, playground, and tennis courts. Residents enjoy a welcoming, family-friendly atmosphere with open green spaces, quiet streets, and sidewalks perfect for evening strolls, bike rides, and outdoor play. The sense of community here is unmatched; neighbors become friends, and every day feels both connected and peaceful. This is more than just a home; it's a place to live, gather, and create lasting memories in one of Leesburg's most desirable neighborhoods. Some images have been virtually staged.
